prompt:
Declaration (in markdown format):

# Audit: pick a database

Compare: postgres, mongodb, redis

## Criteria
- Consistency model (strong vs eventual)
- Cost per GB per month (threshold $0.10)
- Write throughput (min 50,000 ops/sec)
- Schema flexibility (1-5 scale)
- Operational complexity (1-5 scale)
- Cloud provider availability (min 3)

## Weights
- Consistency: 0.3
- Cost: 0.2
- Throughput: 0.25
- Schema flexibility: 0.1
- Operational complexity: 0.1
- Cloud providers: 0.05

## Output
- Recommend the top 1 with justification
- Format: markdown table

Output a flat bullet list manifest of every concrete element this declaration implies.
manifest:
- Audit subject: database selection
- Candidate 1: PostgreSQL
- Candidate 2: MongoDB
- Candidate 3: Redis
- Criterion 1: Consistency model, values strong vs eventual
- Criterion 2: Cost per GB per month, threshold $0.10
- Criterion 3: Write throughput, minimum 50,000 ops/sec
- Criterion 4: Schema flexibility, scale 1–5
- Criterion 5: Operational complexity, scale 1–5
- Criterion 6: Cloud provider availability, minimum 3
- Weight for Consistency: 0.3
- Weight for Cost: 0.2
- Weight for Throughput: 0.25
- Weight for Schema flexibility: 0.1
- Weight for Operational complexity: 0.1
- Weight for Cloud providers: 0.05
- Sum of all weights: 1.0
- Score each candidate against Criterion 1 (Consistency model)
- Score each candidate against Criterion 2 (Cost per GB per month)
- Score each candidate against Criterion 3 (Write throughput)
- Score each candidate against Criterion 4 (Schema flexibility)
- Score each candidate against Criterion 5 (Operational complexity)
- Score each candidate against Criterion 6 (Cloud provider availability)
- Apply weight 0.3 to Consistency scores
- Apply weight 0.2 to Cost scores
- Apply weight 0.25 to Throughput scores
- Apply weight 0.1 to Schema flexibility scores
- Apply weight 0.1 to Operational complexity scores
- Apply weight 0.05 to Cloud provider availability scores
- Calculate weighted total score for PostgreSQL
- Calculate weighted total score for MongoDB
- Calculate weighted total score for Redis
- Disqualify any candidate with cost per GB per month exceeding $0.10
- Disqualify any candidate with write throughput below 50,000 ops/sec
- Disqualify any candidate available on fewer than 3 cloud providers
- Rank all three candidates by weighted total score
- Select top 1 ranked candidate
- Produce a written justification for the top 1 recommendation
- Output format: markdown table
- Markdown table includes all three candidates
- Markdown table includes all six criteria as columns
- Markdown table includes weighted scores or final scores per candidate
- Markdown table includes the top 1 recommendation with justification
